name: Kerberos Golden Ticket Detection
description: Detects and responds to Kerberos golden ticket attacks by analyzing suspicious TGT activity. Uses AI to assess the threat, isolates the suspected domain controller, prepares emergency krbtgt password reset procedures, creates a critical incident ticket, and notifies the incident response team for immediate action.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint
required_integrations.reason: Isolate compromised domain controller from the network

required_integrations.name: Microsoft Graph
required_integrations.reason: Query Active Directory for krbtgt account status and domain controller health

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create P1 critical incident ticket for golden ticket response

data.title: Golden Ticket Alert
data.summary: Fires on golden ticket or Kerberos anomaly detection

data.title: AI Golden Ticket Analysis
data.summary: Analyze Kerberos ticket anomalies for golden ticket indicators

data.title: Golden Ticket Confirmed?
data.summary: Branch based on whether AI confirms golden ticket attack indicators

data.title: Approve DC Isolation
data.summary: Require SOC manager approval before isolating domain controller

config.message: Golden ticket attack confirmed with high confidence. Requesting approval to isolate domain controller {{$.trigger.alert.domain_controller}} and initiate krbtgt reset.

data.title: Isolate Domain Controller
data.summary: Network-isolate the compromised domain controller via EDR

params.reason: Golden ticket attack — domain controller isolation

data.title: Create P1 Incident Ticket
data.summary: Create critical P1 incident ticket for golden ticket response

config.title: P1 CRITICAL: Kerberos Golden Ticket Attack — {{$.trigger.alert.domain_controller}}
config.description: Golden ticket attack confirmed. Domain controller {{$.trigger.alert.domain_controller}} has been isolated. krbtgt password double-reset required. All Kerberos tickets must be considered compromised.

data.title: Notify IR Team
data.summary: Page the incident response team with golden ticket attack details

config.message: CRITICAL: Golden ticket attack confirmed. DC {{$.trigger.alert.domain_controller}} isolated. krbtgt double-reset required immediately. P1 ticket created. All hands on deck.

data.title: Log Low-Confidence Finding
data.summary: Log the alert for further investigation — confidence below threshold

config.note: Kerberos anomaly detected but golden ticket attack not confirmed with high confidence. Logged for further investigation by Tier 2 analyst.

config.summary: Kerberos golden ticket detection and response actions completed
